notes: Lowering and MIR Consolidation wave in closure phase. MIR-consolidation stub retired: compiler/mir/ gains 17 new ops (OpCast, OpBorrow, OpFnPtr, OpCallIndirect, OpSliceNew, OpFieldRead, OpStructNew, OpStructCopy, OpFieldWrite, OpMethodCall, OpEqScalar, OpEqCall, OpWrapping/Checked/Saturating Add/Sub/Mul) plus TermUnreachable, a CastMode enum, Inst fields (Mode/Flag/Extra/FieldName/Fields), Builder methods for every op, validateW15Inst accepting them, and Function.CheckNoMoveAfterMove rejecting reads of a register after OpDrop within the same block. compiler/lower/w15_forms.go adds lowerReference / lowerFieldAccess / lowerMethodCall / lowerSemanticEquality / lowerOptChain / lowerCastTagged + classifyCast / lowerFnPointer / lowerIndexRange / lowerStructLit / lowerOverflowMethod — one lowering helper per W15 form. PassInvariants wraps Validate + CheckNoMoveAfterMove as the W15 invariant walker. Test surface: 29 named tests (TestSealedBlocks, TestStructuralDivergence, TestNoMoveAfterMove, TestInvariantWalkersPass, TestBorrowInstr, TestMethodVsField, TestSemanticEquality, TestOptionalChainLowering, TestCastLowering, TestFnPointerLowering, TestSliceRangeLowering, TestStructUpdateLowering, TestOverflowArithmeticLowering, TestW15InstValidation, TestMirTransforms and their MIR-layer siblings). STUBS.md W15 history block appended; WC015 logged using Rule 10.2 mandated 6-field template. Ninth full wave under Rule 9.5 three-commit discipline: P00 audit (204f081), implementation (f8a789d), PCL (this commit). Next: enter W16 Runtime ABI.
